cwa_eyewall_review.method: single-reviewer station overlay on official composite reflectivity; judgments labeled [推测]

evidence_labels.documented: [据文档] stated by the official source documentation
evidence_labels.inferred: [推测] interpretation requiring an explicit assumption
evidence_labels.verified: [验证过] directly accessed or computed in this run

source_catalog.evidence: [验证过] direct anonymous station-year CSV downloads succeeded
source_catalog.format: CSV; WND field with report type and QC
source_catalog.independence: raw station/GTS measurement; operational information-set overlap disclosed
source_catalog.window: WND type N has no universal encoded averaging period; H/R/T encode 5/60/180 min

source_catalog.access: anonymous HTTPS web API used by CODiS
source_catalog.evidence: [验证过] anonymous station-list and multi-station historical POST requests succeeded
source_catalog.format: JSON; hourly bins with TenMinutelyMaximum/Mean/PeakGust and flags
source_catalog.independence: instrument records; CWA and exchanged operational analyses can ingest them
source_catalog.window: CWA conventional stations expose native 10-minute maximum within each hour

source_catalog.access: anonymous HTTPS endpoints used by the public database
source_catalog.evidence: [验证过] anonymous warning registry, station time series, 6-minute reflectivity images and official PDFs were enumerated for every frozen Taiwan case
source_catalog.format: JSON metadata and station rows; JPEG/GIF/PDF products
source_catalog.independence: station rows duplicate CODiS instruments; reflectivity locates structure but is not a surface-wind observation operator
source_catalog.source: Taiwan CWA Typhoon Database radar and station support archive
source_catalog.window: official-station WSMax is native 10-minute within hourly bins; automatic-station WS window remains undocumented; radar cadence is nominally 6 minutes

source_catalog.evidence: [验证过] anonymous official XLSX download contains station passage maxima through 2025
source_catalog.format: XLSX; gust and maximum hourly mean wind by station
source_catalog.independence: instrument summaries; HKO operational information-set overlap disclosed
source_catalog.source: HKO Tropical Cyclone Impact Dataset and annual publications
source_catalog.window: 60-minute means and passage-wide maxima; exact peak time absent in workbook

source_catalog.evidence: [据文档] public feed is explicitly the latest value; historical 2015-2024 snapshots are not supplied

source_catalog.access: anonymous official download service with session cookie
source_catalog.evidence: [验证过] anonymous multi-station historical CSV POST requests succeeded
source_catalog.format: Shift-JIS CSV with values, QC and homogeneity number
source_catalog.independence: instrument records; JMA and exchanged operational analyses can ingest them
source_catalog.window: hourly samples are the preceding 10-minute mean wind

source_catalog.evidence: [验证过] dataset page requires personal/unit real-name registration
source_catalog.independence: instrument records would be independent measurements with CMA home advantage

source_catalog.access: real-name registration; raw archive not anonymously downloadable
source_catalog.evidence: [验证过] CMA radar product pages require real-name registration; public pages expose derived images
source_catalog.format: radar base/product files or public derived images
source_catalog.independence: raw radial velocity is observational; surface wind fields are inversions and grade C

source_catalog.evidence: [据文档] official OpenAPI requires a utilization application/key
[据文档] official request path requires forms/supporting documents and can charge fees
[验证过] official service lists login/request and per-station hourly fees
[据文档] official procedure requires a written request and payment where applicable
[验证过] case-specific public station/gust/radar values exist; coverage and observation operators vary
source_catalog.independence: raw quoted instrument values can be grade B; analyzed Vmax and inversion products are grade C
source_catalog.source: Official post-storm reviews and peer-reviewed papers
